caption: In an indoor setting, possibly a trade show or conference, a man with glasses and a grey button-down shirt is seen. He wears a white name badge on his chest and stands in front of a white presentation board featuring text and diagrams. In the background, a sign reads "Alpha" and "2938". The man is initially seen smiling and looking toward the camera. As the scene progresses, he moves slightly and shifts his gaze. Another man with a grey beard and a similar grey shirt is partially visible in some frames, appearing to be in conversation or standing nearby. The perspective shifts from a medium shot of the first man to a closer view and then to a lower angle that captures the man's torso and a portion of a white display with a QR code. The man remains composed, maintaining a pleasant expression throughout the sequence.
